---
title: "\'Letter from Arachne\' in \'Two Girls\' views of the Girlhood Question\'"
---

## \'Letter from Arachne\' in \'Two Girls\' views of the Girlhood Question\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1886
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (May 1886) 482-84

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
